summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that MTB is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $214.04. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 10.0%. The asset has recently tested this support 1 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $222.16 and a significant trendline confluence around $221.55 (formed by 2 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
